'''pavocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scallawaggery|scallawaggery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scallawaggery|scallawaggery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pavocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævecheth|pævecheth]] || [[word:pævechej|pævechej]] || [[word:pævechesh|pævechesh]] || [[word:pæveche|pæveche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavovochoth|pavovochoth]] || [[word:pavovochoj|pavovochoj]] || [[word:pavovochosh|pavovochosh]] || [[word:pavovocho|pavovocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavochoth|pavochoth]] || [[word:pavochoj|pavochoj]] || [[word:pavochosh|pavochosh]] || [[word:pavocho|pavocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavofchoth|pavofchoth]] || [[word:pavofchoj|pavofchoj]] || [[word:pavofchosh|pavofchosh]] || [[word:pavofchof|pavofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavochotho|pavochotho]] || [[word:pavochojo|pavochojo]] || [[word:pavochosho|pavochosho]] || [[word:pavochoko|pavochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavochoth|pavochoth]] || [[word:pavochoj|pavochoj]] || [[word:pavochosh|pavochosh]] || [[word:pavocho|pavocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavochothol|pavochothol]] || [[word:pavochojol|pavochojol]] || [[word:pavochoshol|pavochoshol]] || [[word:pavochokol|pavochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavochothotho|pavochothotho]] || [[word:pavochojojo|pavochojojo]] || [[word:pavochoshosho|pavochoshosho]] || [[word:pavochoko|pavochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavochothon|pavochothon]] || [[word:pavochojon|pavochojon]] || [[word:pavochoshon|pavochoshon]] || [[word:pavochokon|pavochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavochothoro|pavochothoro]] || [[word:pavochojoro|pavochojoro]] || [[word:pavochoshoro|pavochoshoro]] || [[word:pavochokoro|pavochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
